title: Enthiran
cast: Rajinikanth, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Danny Denzongpa, Santhanam, Karunas
description: Dr. Vaseegaran creates Chitti, a powerful robot in his own image, but it is rejected by the scientific body AIRD due to its lack of human behaviour and emotions. After a lightning strike triggers emotions in Chitti, he begins to develop human-like feelings. However, Chitti falls in love with Dr. Vaseegaran's fiancée, Sana, and turns against his creator, leading to dangerous consequences.

title: Raavanan
cast: Vikram, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Prithviraj Sukumaran, Karthik Muthuraman, Prabhu
description: After inspector Dev stirs the reign of Veeraiya, a tribal outlaw, the latter responds by kidnapping his wife, Ragini. While she tries to escape from him, Dev fights many resistances to find her.

title: Darling
cast: Prabhas, Kajal Agarwal, Prabhu, Tulasi, Ahuti Prasad
description: Prabha prepares to meet Nandini, his childhood friend, at a reunion party organised by his father. However, things take a turn when Nisha, a gangster's daughter, falls in love with him.

title: Singam
cast: Suriya, Anushka Shetty, Prakash Raj, Nassar, Vivek
description: The story, set in the backdrop of Nallore, a small town in Thoothukudi District, revolves around Sub-Inspector Durai Singam, a brave and just policeman who serves in his hometown primarily to fulfill his father’s wish. Durai Singam settles every dispute in his town patiently with his words of wisdom and resorts to force only when the situation demands it. Kavya, a city girl who comes on vacation to Nallore, falls in love with Durai Singam. Erimalai, Durai Singam's bumbling colleague and friend, often accompanies him.

title: Aayirathil Oruvan
cast: Karthi, R. Parthiban, Reema Sen, Andrea Jeremiah, Prathap Pothan
description: Anitha, a government official, embarks on a journey to find Chandramouli, an archaeologist, who went to Vietnam to search for any existence of the prince of the Chola dynasty.

title: Vinnaithaandi Varuvaayaa
cast: Silambarasan, Trisha Krishnan, VTV Ganesh, Babu Antony, Lakshmi Ramakrishnan
description: A young, aspiring filmmaker falls in love with a girl who moves into the house above his, but her sophisticated nature does more harm than good to him.

title: Ye Maaya Chesave
cast: Naga Chaitanya Akkineni, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Krishnudu, Sapan Saran, Sanjay Swaroop
description: An aspiring Hindu director falls in love with a Christian girl whose parents disapprove of their impending relationship.

title: Nagavalli
cast: Venkatesh, Richa Gangopadhyay, Anushka Shetty, Poonam Kaur, Kamalinee Mukherjee
description: After a family member receives a Nagavalli/Chandramukhi's portrait as a prize in the Nagavalli Dance competition, various characters start having abnormal experiences. In order to save themselves and unfold the mystery, the family looks to Ramachandra Acharya and Dr. Vijay.

title: Siruthai
cast: Karthi, Tamannaah Bhatia, Santhanam, Bhumika Chawla, Manobala
description: A thief comes across a little girl who says that he's her father. When he learns the truth about his lookalike, who's an honest cop, he decides to turn a new leaf and help get rid of the local baddie.

title: Rajanna
cast: Annie, Nagarjuna Akkineni, Sneha, Nassar, Shweta Menon
description: The film is set in the Nelakondapalli village of khammam district in Nizam Princely State of Hyderabad of the late 1940s. The feudal society is under the vice-like grip of an aristocratic family and its head, a Dorasani (Shwetha Menon). Mallamma (Baby Annie) is the darling of the village, who is living in perpetual humiliation. They seek solace in her songs. Brought up by Sambayya, an old man, she develops a mysterious attachment to a basil tree which is regarded as holy by the entire village.

title: Deiva Thirumagal
cast: Vikram, Sara Arjun, Anushka Shetty, Nassar, Amala Paul
description: An intellectually disabled man fights for custody of his 7-year-old daughter, and in the process teaches his opponent lawyer the value of love and family.

title: Kanchana
cast: Raghava Lawrence, R. Sarathkumar, Kovai Sarala, Devadarshini, Sriman
description: Raghava (Lawrence) is a happy go lucky guy who loves to play cricket but is a chicken at heart. The very mention of the word ghost gives him shivers so much that he sleeps with his mom (Kovai Sarala). He is also in love with Priya (Lakshmi Rai). However, an attempt to play a cricket match in an unused ground leads Raghava to get something dark to his home. The dark spirit begins to cause few weird things at home and one day it enters the body of Raghava which goes on killing few specific people. Who is that evil spirit? Why is it killing few people? Can Raghava get rid of the spirit? All this forms the rest of the story.

title: Mankatha
cast: Ajith Kumar, Arjun Sarja, Vaibhav, Ashwin Kakumanu, Premji Amaran
description: Vinayak, a suspended cop, helps a group of four men rob cricket betting money amounting to 500 crores INR. When it comes to splitting the amount, betrayal hits the team hard and a chase ensues.

title: Urumi
cast: Prithviraj Sukumaran, Prabhu Deva, Genelia D'Souza, Vidya Balan, Nithya Menen
description: Kelu is a warrior in 16th century Kerala whose father was killed by Vasco da Gama and his troops. Kelu vows to avenge his father's death with the assistance of Vavvali and Ayesha, a warrior princess.

title: Dookudu
cast: Mahesh Babu, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Sonu Sood, Prakash Raj, Brahmanandam
description: A young policeman hunts down the men who caused the accident that put his politician father into a coma.

title: Thattathin Marayathu
cast: Nivin Pauly, Isha Talwar, Aju Varghese, Sreenivasan, Manoj K Jayan
description: The film is about a Hindu Nair boy, Vinod, and a Muslim girl, Aisha, and the conflict arising out of this inter-faith relationship.

title: Thuppakki
cast: Vijay, Kajal Agarwal, Vidyut Jammwal, Sathyan Sivakumar, Jayaram
description: An army captain on holiday embarks on a mission to track down and destroy a terrorist gang and deactivate the sleeper cells under its command.

title: Eega
cast: Sudeep, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Nani, Adithya Menon, Thagubothu Ramesh
description: Nani is a flower decorator, madly in love with his neighbor Bindhu. He gets killed by the baddie, Sudeep, a powerful businessman. Nani comes back as a housefly to get his revenge.

title: Ustad Hotel
cast: Dulquer Salmaan, Thilakan, Nithya Menen, Siddique, Mamukkoya
description: When his father refuses to support his choice of a career, an aspiring chef tries to fulfil his dream by helping his grandfather run his small eatery.

title: Nanban
cast: Vijay, Jiiva, Srikanth, Ileana D'Cruz, Sathyaraj
description: The plot of the film illustrates the embankment of two friends on a quest for a lost buddy, who was once an optimistic and successful student. On their journey, they recount their college life and special moments that the three shared up until their lost friend secretly parted ways after convocation. During their quest, the two encounter a rival classmate who once made a long forgotten bet with them, a funeral that goes impossibly out of control, and a wedding they must crash.

cast: Dhanush, Shruti Haasan, Sivakarthikeyan, Prabhu, Sunder Ramu
description: Ram and Janani are high school sweethearts who eventually get married. However, Janani is mystified when Ram commits suicide all of a sudden and she tries to find out the truth behind his death.

title: Billa II
cast: Ajith Kumar, Vidyut Jammwal, Sudhanshu Pandey, Yog Jappie, Manoj K Jayan
description: Small-time diamond smuggler David befriends Goa-based gangster Abbasi. But when David begins to build inroads with an international gangster, Abbasi is not happy, and soon the two turn into bitter rivals.

title: Drishyam
cast: Mohanlal, Meena, Asha Sarath, Kalabhavan Shajon, Ansiba Hassan
description: Georgekutty lives a happy life with his wife and daughters. Things take a turn when his daughter gets indecently filmed using a hidden camera, by the son of a police inspector.

title: Vishwaroopam
cast: Kamal Haasan, Rahul Bose, Andrea Jeremiah, Pooja Kumar, Shekhar Kapur
description: Vishwanathan, a Kathak dance teacher in New York, is happy in his marriage with Nirupama, a nuclear oncologist who married him to pursue higher studies in the USA. Deciding to cut ties with her husband, Nirupama hires a private detective to monitor his activities. To her utter shock, certain truths about her husband are subsequently revealed, setting off a chain of events that will change both of their lives irreversibly.

title: Neelakasham Pachakadal Chuvanna Bhoomi
cast: Dulquer Salmaan, Sunny Wayne, Bala Hijam, Ena Saha, Dhritiman Chatterjee
description: Kasi and Suni are close friends who studied together in an engineering college. Assi, who comes to Kerala to study engineering under the North East quota falls in love with Kasi. Certain incidents that follow set Kasi and Suni on a road trip to Nagaland on two motorcycles. The incidents that happen during this road adventure forms the film.

title: Seethamma Vakitlo Sirimalle Chettu
cast: Venkatesh, Mahesh Babu, Prakash Raj, Anjali, Samantha Ruth Prabhu
description: Seethamma Vakitlo Sirimalle Chettu revolves around a lovable family headed by Relangi . He has two sons- Vijay "Peddodu" and Ajay "Chinnodu". The unemployment of his children and the ridicule heaped on the family by relatives puts some strain on the relationships. What does he do in these circumstances is the rest of the story.

title: Singam 2
cast: Suriya, Anushka Shetty, Hansika Motwani, Vivek, Santhanam
description: Picking up the storyline from where Singam ended, Duraisingam has gone undercover after meeting the Home Minister and is working as an NCC officer in a school in Thoothukudi. The only people who know about this operation are the Chief Minister and Home Minister apart from himself.

title: Kaththi
cast: Vijay, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Sathish, Neil Nitin Mukesh, Tota Roy Chowdhury
description: Kathiresan aka Kaththi, a criminal, escapes from the Kolkata prison and comes to Chennai, where he comes across his doppelganger Jeevanandham, fighting for his life after being shot at by unknown men. Kathir decides to pass off as Jeeva and make away with a lump sum amount but once he realizes who Jeeva really is, Kathir turns a crusader.

title: Bangalore Days
cast: Nazriya Nazim Fahadh, Nivin Pauly, Dulquer Salmaan, Fahadh Faasil, Parvathy Thiruvothu
description: A fun roller coaster ride about three young people, Aju, Divya and Kuttan who are cousins, reach Bangalore to dream, discover & explore!

title: 1: Nenokkadine
cast: Mahesh Babu, Kriti Sanon, Nassar, Anu Hasan, Kelly Dorji
description: A schizophrenic rock musician, is convinced that his parents were murdered by three men. Taking the support of a journalist, he sets out to find the culprits. Will he succeed in his mission, and in the process, what will he learn about his own roots?

title: Manam
cast: Nagarjuna Akkineni, Nageshwara Rao Akkineni, Naga Chaitanya Akkineni, Shriya Saran, Samantha Ruth Prabhu
description: A married couple die in an accident, leaving behind a son. As he grows up and becomes successful, he comes across reincarnations of his father and mother as youngsters, and vows to bring them back together.

title: Jilla
cast: Mohanlal, Vijay, Sampath Raj, Kajal Agarwal, Mahat Raghavendra
description: A cop decides to take on his godfather, who raised him from childhood, and make him realize the error of his ways.

title: Jigarthanda
cast: Siddharth, Bobby Simha, Karunakaran, Ramachandran Durairaj, Guru Somasundaram
description: A budding director endeavors to research a merciless gangster for making a film on gangsterism. But his secret attempts to conduct the research fail when he gets caught for snooping.

title: Bāhubali: The Beginning
cast: Prabhas, Rana Daggubati, Tamannaah Bhatia, Anushka Shetty, Ramya Krishnan
description: The young Shivudu is left as a foundling in a small village by his mother. By the time he’s grown up, it has become apparent that he possesses exceptional gifts. He meets the beautiful warrior princess Avanthika and learns that her queen has been held captive for the last 25 years. Shividu sets off to rescue her, discovering his own origins in the process.

title: Premam
cast: Nivin Pauly, Madonna Sebastian, Sai Pallavi, Anupama Parameswaran, Shabareesh Varma
description: Three stages in George's life, and three girls he encounters in each stage.

title: I
cast: Vikram, Amy Jackson, Suresh Gopi, Upen Patel, Ramkumar Ganesan
description: A deformed hunchback kidnaps a bride and holds her hostage while his connection to her and his targets is revealed in a series of flashbacks that unfold as he starts seeking revenge.

title: Loafer
cast: Varun Tej, Disha Patani, Revathi, Posani Krishna Murali, Mukesh Rishi
description: Raja, who thinks his mother is dead, turns into a thief. However, his life changes when he falls for Mounika, a girl who is escaping a forced marriage, and eventually meets her aunt.

title: Demonte Colony
cast: Arulnithi, Ramesh Thilak, Sananth, Abhishek Joseph, Antti Jääskeläinen
description: Four friends go into a haunted mansion on a whim but they do not realize that they have returned home with an evil spirit, from which escape might be impossible.

title: Appa
cast: Samuthirakani, Thambi Ramaiah, Namo Narayanan, Vinodhini Vaidyanathan, J Vignesh
description: A do-gooder who views everything in a different perspective, inspires others by being a doting father, and tries to bring in a few changes in the society.

title: Pavada
cast: Prithviraj Sukumaran, Anoop Menon, Asha Sarath, Miya George, Maniyanpilla Raju
description: Joy a young man who leads a carefree life. Joy acquaintance Babu Joseph, an English professor, and they reminiscence some seemingly forgotten memories.

title: Theri
cast: Vijay, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Amy Jackson, Prabhu, Radikaa Sarathkumar
description: When an honest cop, Vijay Kumar's family is ruthlessly slaughtered by a politician and his aides, he decides to change his identity and commits his life to bring his daughter up in a serene atmosphere. But some freak events end up compromising his identity and what he does to save his daughter and avenge the death of his family unfurls as Theri.

title: Janatha Garage
cast: N.T. Rama Rao Jr., Mohanlal, Unni Mukundan, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Nithya Menen
description: Anand is an environmental activist who lives in Mumbai. A chance exchange programme takes him to Hyderabad and here, a chance encounter with Satyam results in him taking over the Janatha Garage from the latter.

title: Dhuruvangal Pathinaaru
cast: Rahman, Ashwin Kumar, Pradeep, Santosh Krishna, Praveen
description: A former cop looks back on the case which left him disabled and forced him to quit the force.

title: Kabali
cast: Rajinikanth, Radhika Apte, Sai Dhanshika, Winston Chao, Kishore
description: A gangster in Malaysia goes in search of his family after 25 years of imprisonment.

title: Bāhubali 2: The Conclusion
cast: Prabhas, Rana Daggubati, Anushka Shetty, Sathyaraj, Nassar
description: When Mahendra, the son of Bāhubali, learns about his heritage, he begins to look for answers. His story is juxtaposed with past events that unfolded in the Mahishmati Kingdom.

title: Mersal
cast: Vijay, S. J. Suryah, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Nithya Menen, Kajal Agarwal
description: A few individuals in the medical profession are murdered or kidnapped, and the cop investigating the case suspects a doctor and arrests him. But is he the one who is behind these crimes? And why are they being committed?

title: Vikram Vedha
cast: R. Madhavan, Vijay Sethupathi, Shraddha Srinath, Kathir, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar
description: A notorious gangster Vedha surrenders himself to encounter specialist Vikram whom he challenges every step of the way by narrating his life events in the form of riddles that needs to be solved in order to capture him.

title: Arjun Reddy
cast: Vijay Deverakonda, Shalini Pandey, Rahul Ramakrishna, Kamal Kamaraju, Kanchana
description: When his girlfriend is forced to marry another man, a troubled young surgeon begins to self-destruct.

title: The Ghazi Attack
cast: Kay Kay Menon, Rana Daggubati, Atul Kulkarni, Taapsee Pannu, Amitabh Bachchan
description: India’s first underwater war film tries to decode the mystery behind the sinking of Pakistani submarine PNS Ghazi during the Indo-Pak war of 1971.

title: Spyder
cast: Mahesh Babu, Rakul Preet Singh, S. J. Suryah, Bharath Srinivasan, RJ Balaji
description: A surveillance expert who wants to help people comes across a foe who is the very definition of evil. Can he stop the man before he destroys everything?

title: Geetha Govindam
cast: Vijay Deverakonda, Rashmika Mandanna, Vennela Kishore, Subbaraju, Rahul Ramakrishna
description: Vijay Govind, a young college lecturer who dreams of marriage falls for Geetha, a level-headed woman who's wary of strangers and isn't easy to convince. While things seem to go smoothly, Vijay makes a terrible mistake which not only derails any hope for his love story, but also potential repercussions with his family.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
cast: Yash, Srinidhi Shetty, Ramachandra Raju, Archana Jois, Anant Nag
description: A period drama set in the 1970s, KGF follows the story of a fierce rebel who rises against the brutal oppression in Kolar Gold Fields and becomes the symbol of hope to legions of downtrodden people.

title: Ratsasan
cast: Vishnu Vishal, Amala Paul, Suzane George, Kaali Venkat, Radha Ravi
description: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

title: Sarkar
cast: Vijay, Keerthy Suresh, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, Prem, Yogi Babu
description: NRI corporate Sundar Ramasamy comes to India to vote, only to learn that his vote has already been cast. While he reclaims his right legally, it also sets in motion a chain of events that eventually lead to him entering the political fray, trying to change the system.

cast: Vijay Sethupathi, Trisha Krishnan, Aditya Baskar, Gouri G Kishan, Devadarshini
description: Ram is a photographer and nature lover who travels all around India capturing moments. On a chance visit to his hometown Tanjavur, he goes into his school and begins to walk down memory lane to 1994 when he was a student harboring feelings for his classmate Janu.

cast: Rajinikanth, Akshay Kumar, Amy Jackson, Sudhanshu Pandey, Adil Hussain
description: An ornithologist who commits suicide returns as fifth force to wreack vengeance on mankind for harming birds with mobile phone radiation. The only thing that is standing in his way is 2.0, the upgraded version of Chitti, the robot.

title: Vada Chennai
cast: Dhanush, Andrea Jeremiah, Samuthirakani, Daniel Balaji, Kishore
description: A young carrom player in North Chennai becomes a reluctant participant in a war between two feuding gangsters.

title: Mahanati
cast: Keerthy Suresh, Dulquer Salmaan, Samantha Ruth Prabhu, Vijay Deverakonda, Prakash Raj
description: Mahanati depicts the life and career of one of Telugu cinema's greatest and most iconic starlets, the first Indian female super star, Savitri.

title: Aravindha Sametha
cast: N.T. Rama Rao Jr., Pooja Hegde, Jagapati Babu, Naveen Chandra, Eesha Rebba
description: A young scion of a powerful family with a long history of violence decides to put an end to the bloodshed which leads him to a path of self discovery.

title: Saaho
cast: Prabhas, Shraddha Kapoor, Neil Nitin Mukesh, Chunky Pandey, Mandira Bedi
description: A battle for power ensues as warring gangters thrive to gain possession of a "black box" that can make them richer than they already are, and an undercover cop intervenes with the help of his sharp intellect and an instinct to kill.

title: Kaithi
cast: Karthi, Narain, Arjun Das, Harish Uthaman, George Mariyan
description: Dilli, a convicted criminal, is out on parole to meet his daughter. However, a drug bust sets him off on a mission to save the life of police officers.

title: Lucifer
cast: Mohanlal, Vivek Oberoi, Manju Warrier, Tovino Thomas, Indrajith Sukumaran
description: In God's own country, the supreme leader of the ruling party dies, leaving a huge vacuum, not only in the electoral and leadership sphere of the party but also that of the state. In the inevitable succession squabble and the power struggle that ensues, the thin line that separates good and bad becomes irrecoverably blurred and out of this seemingly endless mayhem, emerge forces that are hitherto unheard of.

title: Petta
cast: Rajinikanth, Nawazuddin Siddiqui, Vijay Sethupathi, Sananth, M. Sasikumar
description: A hostel warden becomes the target of a dreaded politician and his gangster son, but little do they realise that it is they who should fear him.

title: Bigil
cast: Vijay, Nayanthara, Jackie Shroff, Kathir, Vivek
description: A do-gooder don wants his footballer son to uplift the life of his people by becoming a champion, but fate draws the youngster into a life of violence. Will he be able to fulfill his father’s dream when an opportunity comes his way seven years later?

title: Ala Vaikunthapurramuloo
cast: Allu Arjun, Pooja Hegde, Murali Sharma, Jayaram, Sushanth
description: Fate plays a vital role in connecting the life of Bantu, a son who seeks validation from his cold-hearted father with the life of Raj, whose millionaire father wishes that he was more assertive.

title: V
cast: Nani, Sudheer Babu, Nivetha Thomas, Aditi Rao Hydari, Vennela Kishore
description: DCP Aditya, a celebrated cop, faces his most unsettling case yet involving a mysterious serial killer who has been brutally killing his targets and leaving behind notes challenging Aditya to nab him. Teaming with Apoorva, an aspiring crime novelist, and the police force, Aditya finds himself walking on thin ice upon discovering the killer has another challenge for him: to prevent four more murders from happening or give up his medals and resign. What he is yet to find out is the killer's past and his desperation to carry out the killing spree without fail.

title: Soorarai Pottru
cast: Suriya, Aparna Balamurali, Paresh Rawal, Mohan Babu, Urvashi
description: Nedumaaran Rajangam "Maara" sets out to make the common man fly and in the process takes on the world's most capital intensive industry and several enemies who stand in his way.

title: Darbar
cast: Rajinikanth, Nayanthara, Suniel Shetty, Nivetha Thomas, Yogi Babu
description: Aaditya, the commissioner of Mumbai Police, sets out to catch Ajay, a drug peddler. However, he uncovers a deeper controversy linked to an international drug lord and must mete out justice.

title: Pushpa: The Rise - Part 1
cast: Allu Arjun, Rashmika Mandanna, Jagadeesh Bandari, Sunil Varma, Anasuya Bharadwaj
description: Pushpa Raj is a coolie who rises in the world of red sandalwood smuggling. Along the way, he doesn’t shy from making an enemy or two.

title: Drishyam 2
cast: Mohanlal, Meena, Murali Gopy, Asha Sarath, Siddique
description: 7 years after the events of Drishyam, the family lives with the trauma from that fateful night. A gripping tale of an investigation and a family threatened by it. Will Georgekutty be able to protect his family this time?

title: Tamil Rockers
cast: Premji Amaran, Meenakshi Dixit, VTV Ganesh, S.P.B. Charan, Devadarshini
description: 4 Major characters running for the Money facing more challenges by forgetting the fact that it's not the decision of money to reach human.

title: Jai Bhim
cast: Suriya, Lijomol Jose, Baby Joshika Maya, Manikandan, Rajisha Vijayan
description: A pregnant woman from a primitive tribal community, searches desperately for her husband, who is missing from police custody. So as to find her husband and seek justice for them, as their voice, a High Court advocate rises in support. Will their battle for justice succeed?

title: Master
cast: Vijay, Vijay Sethupathi, Arjun Das, Malavika Mohanan, Andrea Jeremiah
description: An alcoholic professor is sent to a juvenile school, where he clashes with a gangster, who uses the children of the school for criminal activities.

title: Minnal Murali
cast: Tovino Thomas, Guru Somasundaram, Aju Varghese, Vasisht Umesh, Shelly Kishore
description: A tailor gains special powers after being struck by lightning but must take down an unexpected foe if he is to become the superhero his hometown in Kerala needs.

title: Karnan
cast: Dhanush, Rajisha Vijayan, Natarajan Subramaniam, Lal, Yogi Babu
description: Karnan, an angry young man, fights for the rights of his oppressed people. Can he save them from those who wield power and weapons?

title: RRR
cast: N.T. Rama Rao Jr., Ram Charan, Olivia Morris, Ray Stevenson, Alison Doody
description: A fictional history of two legendary revolutionaries' journey away from home before they began fighting for their country in the 1920s.

title: K.G.F: Chapter 2
cast: Yash, Sanjay Dutt, Raveena Tandon, Srinidhi Shetty, Archana Jois
description: The blood-soaked land of Kolar Gold Fields (KGF) has a new overlord now - Rocky, whose name strikes fear in the heart of his foes. His allies look up to Rocky as their Savior, the government sees him as a threat to law and order; enemies are clamoring for revenge and conspiring for his downfall. Bloodier battles and darker days await as Rocky continues on his quest for unchallenged supremacy.

title: Vikram
cast: Kamal Haasan, Fahadh Faasil, Vijay Sethupathi, Narain, Chemban Vinod Jose
description: Amar is assigned to investigate a case of serial killings. When Amar investigates the case, he realizes it is not what it seems to be and following down this path will lead to nothing but war between everyone involved.

title: Acharya
cast: Chiranjeevi, Ram Charan, Sonu Sood, Jisshu Sengupta, Ajay
description: Acharya, a middle-aged Naxalite-turned-social reformer, launches a fight against the Endowments Department over misappropriation and embezzlement of temple funds and donations.

title: Ponniyin Selvan: Part I
cast: Vikram, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, Ravi Mohan, Karthi, Trisha Krishnan
description: The Chola kingdom is under threat from forces both internal and external, and with crown prince Aaditha Karikalan, his younger brother Arunmozhi Varman and the emperor, Sundara Cholar separated by situations, it is up to a messenger to ensure the safety of the kingdom. Can he succeed in his mission, especially with Karikalan's former girlfriend, Nandhini, plotting to bring down the entire Chola empire?

title: Jana Gana Mana
cast: Prithviraj Sukumaran, Suraj Venjaramoodu, Mamta Mohandas, Vincy Aloshious, Shari
description: Ramanagara wakes up to a series of events that shocks the entire Nation. In this crisis, two individuals with two different perspectives on law and justice intervene to define the truth.

title: Sita Ramam
cast: Dulquer Salmaan, Mrunal Thakur, Rashmika Mandanna, Sumanth, Gautham Vasudev Menon
description: Afreen, a rebellious Pakistani student sets ablaze the car of an Indian in London. Angered Afreen returns to Pakistan to ask for money from her grandfather that she has to pay in a month's time as damages. However, she gets to know that he is no more and the only thing he has left for her is a letter-delivering task, written by Ram to Sita. As Afreen sets out to find Ram, there begins her journey of discovering the secret behind the 20-year-old letter.

title: Hridayam
cast: Pranav Mohanlal, Darshana Rajendran, Kalyani Priyadarshan, Aswath Lal, Vijayaraghavan
description: Arun and Darshana are first-year engineering students and they fall in love soon after their college begins. And just as how things work generally in teenage, the road ahead isn't too easy for them. Life offers many twists and turns that they least expect.

title: 777 Charlie
cast: Rakshit Shetty, Raj B Shetty, Bobby Simha, Sangeetha Sringeri, Bhargavi Narayan
description: Dharma is stuck in a rut with his negative and lonely lifestyle and spends each day in the comfort of his loneliness. A pup named Charlie who is naughty and energetic which is a complete contrast with the Dharma’s character enters his life and gives him a new perspective towards it.

title: Kantara
cast: Rishab Shetty, Sapthami Gowda, Kishore, Achyuth Kumar, Pramod Shetty
description: Shiva, a tribal vagabond lives with his mother in hamlet, stays away from the traditional Daivaradhane and Bhoota Kola legacy due to an unforgettable childhood incident. He is happy loafing around with his friends and doing petty jobs for his landlord. When Forest officer Murali enters the scene, it gives a fresh dimension to the man-vs-nature fight. Can Shiva save the forest from Murali? Or is Murali just a dummy bait cast by bigger fish?

title: Salaar: Part 1 - Ceasefire
cast: Prabhas, Prithviraj Sukumaran, Shruti Haasan, Easwari Rao, Jagapati Babu
description: Set in the fictional dystopian city-state of Khansaar, the film follows the friendship between Deva, a tribesman, and Varadha, the prince of Khansaar. When a coup d'état is planned by his father's ministers and his relatives, Varadha enlists Deva's help to become Khansaar's undisputed ruler.

title: Toby
cast: Raj B Shetty, Chaithra J Achar, Samyukta Hornad, Deepak Shetty, Gopalkrishna Deshpande
description: An estranged man deemed to be a beast vows to break free from the evil world and transform himself for his foster daughter.

title: Amigos
cast: Kalyan Ram, Ashika Ranganath, Brahmaji, Jayaprakash, Saptagiri
description: Siddharth, a youngman who runs a family business is astonished to find his doppelgängers Manjunath and Michael on getdopple.com. After meeting up in Goa, they come down to Hyderabad to help Siddarth win over Ishika, a girl looking for superman to be her husband. But things take a drastic turn when NIA swings into action to nab Michael, aka Bipin Roy.

title: Hi Nanna
cast: Nani, Mrunal Thakur, Baby Kiara Khanna, Jayaram, Shilpa Tulaskar
description: Six-year-old Mahi, a spirited child with cystic fibrosis, shares a deep yet complex bond with her father, Viraj, a dedicated single parent and successful fashion photographer. Her curiosity about her absent mother leads to a journey of discovery when she runs away with her loyal dog, Pluto. A chance encounter with a kind woman named Yashna sparks unexpected revelations, intertwining their lives in ways they never anticipated. Set against a backdrop of love, sacrifice, and redemption, Mahi’s story is a heartfelt exploration of family, resilience, and the enduring power of connection.

title: Leo
cast: Vijay, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Sarja, Trisha Krishnan, Gautham Vasudev Menon
description: A mild-mannered man becomes a local hero through an act of violence, but it brings forth consequences with connection to a dangerous world, one which will shake his carefully constructed life to its very core.

title: RDX: Robert Dony Xavier
cast: Shane Nigam, Antony Varghese, Neeraj Madhav, Lal, Babu Antony
description: Once-menacing, anger fueled, trained martial arts fighters Robert, Dony and Xavier settle down to peaceful lives, after a significant event prompts them. Fate orchestrates their reunion and return from exile to their fighting ways, when their history linger ominously and one of them faces a violent attack.

title: Amaran
cast: Sivakarthikeyan, Sai Pallavi, Rahul Bose, Bhuvan Arora, Lallu Prasath
description: A heroic true story of Major Mukund Varadarajan, an Indian Army officer who displayed extraordinary bravery during a counterterrorism mission in Kashmir’s Shopian district. The film captures his courage in protecting his nation and the devotion of his wife Indhu Rebecaa Varghese.

title: Devara: Part 1
cast: N.T. Rama Rao Jr., Saif Ali Khan, Prakash Raj, Srikanth, Kalaiyarasan
description: Devara, a fearless man from a coastal region, embarks on a perilous journey into the treacherous world of the sea to safeguard the lives of his people. Unbeknownst to him, his brother Bhaira is plotting a conspiracy against him. As events unfold, Devara passes on his legacy to his mild-mannered and timid son, Varada.

title: Saptha Kandam
cast: Sreelakshmi Aravindakshan
description: In a remote resort, newlyweds Apsara and her husband, Laalu, face a dangerous bet with the wealthy moneylender, Madhavan, who seeks to claim Apsara. Over the course of seven days, Madhavan attempts to seduce her through discussions of an ancient book on lust. Meanwhile, Apsara, determined to remain faithful, battles his advances. The outcome of the bet hinges on her ability to resist his manipulation and maintain her resolve.

title: Pushpa 2 - The Rule
cast: Allu Arjun, Rashmika Mandanna, Fahadh Faasil, Jagadeesh Bandari, Rao Ramesh
description: As his smuggling empire grows, a brazen Pushpa longs for power and respect on his vengeful journey, while facing old rivals and new.

title: Kalki 2898-AD
cast: Amitabh Bachchan, Prabhas, Deepika Padukone, Kamal Haasan, Saswata Chatterjee
description: In the year 2898 AD, around 6000 years after Kurukshetra war, Ashwatthama gears up for his final battle of redemption at the sign of hope in a dystopian world and Bhairava, a wisecracking and self-interested bounty hunter, tired of the perilous life becomes the hurdle in the process.

title: Lover
cast: Manikandan, Sri Gouri Priya Reddy, Kanna Ravi, Harini Sundararajan, Harish Kumar
description: An alcoholic designer struggles to save his six-year relationship while facing personal challenges and misunderstandings. As their bond is tested, he begins to confront his past and question whether love alone is enough to hold them together.

title: Marco
cast: Unni Mukundan, Siddique, Ishan Shoukath, Jagadish, Abhimanyu Thilakan
description: The adoptive son of the Adattu family, Marco, sets off on a ruthless quest for vengeance after his brother is brutally murdered, finding only betrayal, loss and unimaginable brutality at every step.

title: All We Imagine as Light
cast: Kani Kusruti, Divya Prabha, Chhaya Kadam, Hridhu Haroon, Azees Nedumangad
description: In Mumbai, Nurse Prabha's routine is troubled when she receives an unexpected gift from her estranged husband. Her younger roommate, Anu, tries in vain to find a spot in the city to be intimate with her boyfriend. A trip to a beach town allows them to find a space for their desires to manifest.

title: Maharaja
cast: Vijay Sethupathi, Anurag Kashyap, Sachana Namidass, Natarajan Subramaniam, Abhirami
description: A barber seeks vengeance after his home is burglarized, cryptically telling police his "Lakshmi" has been taken, leaving them uncertain if it's a person or object, jeer at his request until they learn what they're really looking for.

title: Kanguva
cast: Suriya, Bobby Deol, Disha Patani, B. S. Avinash, Kovai Sarala
description: A bounty hunter in present day, learns about his previous life as a legendary warrior, when fate unites him with a mutant kid.

title: The Goat Life
cast: Prithviraj Sukumaran, K R  Gokul, Jimmy Jean-Louis, Talib Al Balushi, Rik Aby
description: Indian migrant worker Najeeb Muhammad goes to Saudi Arabia to earn money. However, in a twist of fate, he finds himself living a slave-like existence, herding goats in the middle of the desert.

title: Lucky Baskhar
cast: Dulquer Salmaan, Meenakshi Chaudhary, Rajkumar Kasireddy, Ramki, Maganti Srinath
description: A cash-strapped bank cashier embarks on a risky investment scheme and soon gets drawn into the murky world of money laundering.

title: Aavesham
cast: Fahadh Faasil, Hipster, Mithun Jai Sankar, Roshan Shanavas, Sajin Gopu
description: Three college freshmen in Bangalore befriend an eccentric gangster to get revenge on their senior bullies.

title: Premalu
cast: Naslen, Mamitha Baiju, Sangeeth Prathap, Shyam Mohan, Akhila Bhargavan
description: Sachin, a carefree graduate, crosses paths with Reenu, a spirited IT professional, in Hyderabad. As their friendship deepens, unspoken feelings, career ambitions and life choices challenge their bond.

title: Manjummel Boys
cast: Soubin Shahir, Sreenath Bhasi, Balu Varghese, Ganapathi S Poduval, Lal Jr.
description: Manjummel Boys, based on a real story, is about a bunch of friends who set out on a trip to Kodaikanal and the events that occur there.

title: Vettaiyan
cast: Rajinikanth, Amitabh Bachchan, Fahadh Faasil, Rana Daggubati, Manju Warrier
description: A sought-after Supercop gets caught in a series of unexpected events when he encounters a suspect who is accused of being involved in a murder case.

title: Sookshmadarshini
cast: Nazriya Nazim Fahadh, Basil Joseph, Sidharth Bharathan, Deepak Parambol, Merin Philip
description: Manuel returns with his mother to their former home in a middle-class neighbourhood. Suspicious of his intentions, Priyadarshini and her friends begin gathering clues, convinced he may be hiding something sinister.

title: The Greatest of All Time
cast: Vijay, Prashanth, Prabhu Deva, Mohan, Ajmal Ameer
description: A once decorated member of the Special Anti-Terrorism Squad (SATS) is called back into action by his former colleagues for an important mission, setting him on a dangerous collision course with his own past.

title: Hanu-Man
cast: Teja Sajja, Vinay Rai, Amritha Aiyer, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, Vennela Kishore
description: In a small village, Hanumanthu, a petty thief, finds a mysterious gem, that gives him god-like powers. Will he succeed in keeping these powers from falling into the wrong hands and save his village?

title: Martin
cast: Dhruva Sarja, Vaibhavi Shandilya, Anveshi Jain, Giorgia Andriani, Chikkanna
description: Martin revolves around Lt. Brigadier Arjun Saxena, whose journey takes him from Pakistan to India to discover his real identity and fight against black market dealers, who are involved with terrorists to orchestrate massive attacks in the country.

title: Bramayugam
cast: Arjun Ashokan, Mammootty, Sidharth Bharathan, Manikanda Achari, Amalda Liz
description: Thevan, a folk singer of the Paanan caste, has a fateful encounter when escaping slavery, leading to discover an ancient tradition altering his destiny.

title: Vidaamuyarchi
cast: Ajith Kumar, Arjun Sarja, Regina Cassandra, Trisha Krishnan, Aarav Kizar
description: Arjun and Kayal, an Indian couple living in Azerbaijan, set out on a journey to visit her parents. Their peaceful trip takes a terrifying turn when Kayal mysteriously disappears. With time running out, Arjun must navigate a web of danger and deception, facing a ruthless gang determined to keep him from uncovering the truth.

title: Daaku Maharaaj
cast: Nandamuri Balakrishna, Bobby Deol, Pragya Jaiswal, Shraddha Srinath, Vedha Agarwal
description: A man defends a beleaguered rural community from murderous drug-traffickers.

title: Painkili
cast: Sajin Gopu, Anaswara Rajan, Jisma Jiji, Roshan Shanavas, Chandu Salimkumar
description: Tale of Suku, who fakes insanity to escape the law. While faking insanity, he falls in love.

title: Aghathiyaa
cast: Jiiva, Raashii Khanna, Arjun Sarja, Edward Sonnenblick, Matilda
description: Things go awry when a haunted mansion is opened as a tourist attraction by Aghathiyan leading to the unraveling of the dark history behind the mansion's previous occupant.

title: Nilavuku En Mel Ennadi Kobam
cast: Pavish Narayanan, Anikha Surendran, Priya Prakash Varrier, Mathew Thomas, Venkatesh Menon
description: All set to move on with his life, a boy unexpectedly reconnects with his past love.

title: Game Changer
cast: Ram Charan, Anjali, Kiara Advani, S. J. Suryah, Srikanth
description: Ram, a newly appointed district collector, takes charge in a city in Andhra Pradesh and immediately confronts the deeply entrenched corruption and inefficiency plaguing the government. Determined to bring reforms, he initiates sweeping changes, sparking a fierce conflict with a powerful state Minister.

title: Thandel
cast: Naga Chaitanya Akkineni, Sai Pallavi, Sundip Ved, Prakash Belawadi, Kalpalatha
description: Fisherman Raju is deeply in love with Satya. However, at one point, she urges him to stop going to the sea and look for other jobs. Ignoring her plea, Raju ventures out and accidentally drifts into Pakistani waters, where he is arrested.

title: Sabdham
cast: Aadhi Pinisetty, Lakshmi Menon, Redin Kingsley, Laila, Simran
description: A paranormal investigator is employed by a university to investigate a series of mysterious deaths some are attributing to supernatural causes.

title: Machante Malakha
cast: Soubin Shahir, Namitha Pramod, Dileesh Pothan, Manoj K U, Shanthi Krishna
description: An over-affectionate wife and a husband, who tries hard to adjust with it.

title: Identity
cast: Tovino Thomas, Trisha Krishnan, Vinay Rai, Mandira Bedi, Shammi Thilakan
description: A sketch artist and a cop work together to unravel the identity of an elusive killer using the descriptions of his face, etched into the memory of an eye-witness to the brutal crime

title: Dragon
cast: Pradeep Ranganathan, Anupama Parameswaran, Kayadu Lohar, Mysskin, Gautham Vasudev Menon
description: Ragavan, infamous for his reckless ways and academic struggles, turns to fraud after a heartbreaking breakup, chasing wealth and power. However, his deceit leads him into perilous territory. Can he find a way out, or will his choices seal his fate?

title: Kannappa
cast: Vishnu Manchu, Preity Mukhundhan, Akshay Kumar, Mohan Babu, Mohanlal
description: An atheist hunter Kannappa becomes a devotee of Lord Shiva and plucked out his eyes in an act of devotion.

title: Kadhalikka Neramillai
cast: Ravi Mohan, Nithya Menen, TJ Bhanu, John Kokken, Lal
description: Does the idea of a perfect life leading to love, marriage and babies exist? Shriya finds it a challenge, especially when she meets men like Siddarth who think marriage is a recipe for disaster, and babies should be banned. When times are changing and relationships are evolving, the idea of love remains timeless- the more you resist it the more you will fall in love.

title: Rekhachithram
cast: Asif Ali, Anaswara Rajan, Manoj K Jayan, Zarin Shihab, Bhama Arun
description: Having recently served a suspension for gambling online while on duty, Circle Inspector Vivek Gopinath rejoins the police force and is looking to reclaim his lost honour. Awaiting him is a 40-year-old, unresolved murder mystery with a faceless victim.

title: Sankranthiki Vasthunam
cast: Venkatesh, Aishwarya Rajesh, Meenakshi Chaudhary, Upendra Limaye, Sai Kumar
description: An ex-cop's attempt to rescue a key figure becomes a hilarious juggling act between his wife and former lover.

title: Empuraan
cast: Mohanlal, Prithviraj Sukumaran, Manju Warrier, Tovino Thomas, Indrajith Sukumaran
description: The film acts as  Stephen’s rise to power as the infamous Khureshi Ab’raam as well as the aftermath of his departure from Kerala politics at the end of Lucifer.

title: Kingston
cast: G. V. Prakash Kumar, Divyabharathi, Chetan, Elango Kumaravel, Sabumon Abdusamad

title: Mazaka
cast: Sundeep Kishan, Rao Ramesh, Ritu Varma, Anshu, Murali Sharma
description: The path to true love does not run smoothly when a father and son seek marriage at the same time.

title: Gentlewoman
cast: Lijomol Jose, Hari Krishnan, Losliya Mariyanesan
description: Errors spun by the threads of kinship, the lives of two women unfold, each tale revealed through her own eyes.In this story, the bond between a married woman and her kitchen becomes central to a dark tale of betrayal. Her husband’s mysterious disappearance reveals his affair with an unmarried client, sparking a tense investigation led by the client, who grows suspicious of the wife’s seemingly detached behaviour. While authorities suspect he fled due to financial troubles, the wife seems to know a deeper, nal truth about his fate. In her mind, men who leave women in anguish deserve no farewell.

title: Officer on Duty
cast: Kunchacko Boban, Priyamani, Jagadish, Vishak Nair, Ramzan Muhammed
description: A demoted police inspector investigates a counterfeit jewelry racket, becoming entangled in a dangerous web of crime that puts his life at stake.

title: Aalambana
cast: Vaibhav, Parvatii Nair, Munishkanth, Yogi Babu, Anandaraj
description: A kind-hearted but struggling farmer faces financial difficulties and worries about his family's well-being. His life takes a fantastical turn when he accidentally unearths a magical lamp containing a genie.

title: Adhirshtasaali
cast: R. Madhavan, Madonna Sebastian, Sai Dhanshika, Upasana Rai, Radikaa Sarathkumar
description: The life and achievements of GD Naidu.

title: The Raja Saab
cast: Malavika Mohanan, Nidhhi Agerwal, Riddhi Kumar, Brahmanandam, Yogi Babu

title: Madha Gaja Raja
cast: Vishal Krishna, Santhanam, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, Anjali, Sonu Sood
description: Raja, a witty and fearless young man, becomes entangled in a conflict with a corrupt industrialist while trying to protect his family, friends and the woman he loves.

title: Hari Hara Veera Mallu : Part 1 - Sword vs Spirit
cast: Pawan Kalyan, Bobby Deol, Nidhhi Agerwal, Nassar, Sunil Varma
description: Set in the Mughal Era, outlaw Veera Mallu is tasked with the job of stealing the Koh-i-Noor diamond from the Mughals.

title: Veera Dheera Sooran: Part 2
cast: Vikram, S. J. Suryah, Suraj Venjaramoodu, Dushara Vijayan, Prudhviraj
description: Kaali is a provision store owner and a loving husband and father, whose involvement in a dangerous crime network and his mysterious mission forms the rest of the story.

title: Niram Marum Ulagil
cast: Bharathiraja, Rio Raj, Sandy, Aegan, Natarajan Subramaniam

title: Love Insurance Kompany
cast: Pradeep Ranganathan, S. J. Suryah, Krithi Shetty, Yogi Babu, Gouri G Kishan
description: Set 10 years into the future, both a father and son fall in love with the same call girl.

title: Manidham
cast: Krishna Raju K., Madhunika Rajalakshmi, Kalaimamani Sellappa Jegashanmugam, Yatra Srinivassan, Lakshmi Narayanan
description: Manidham is an Emotional and Thought-provoking Dramathat Challenges Viewers to Reflect on Their Own Lives and the Impact of Their Choices.He Film Follows Krishnaraj, a Middle-aged Schoolteacher and Devoted Family Man,whose Sudden Death Forces Him to Confront the True Consequences of His Life Decisions, Even as His Restless Spiritremains Bound to His Home.

title: Asthram  – The Secret
cast: Shaam, Niranjani Ashokan, Ranjith D, Nizhalgal Ravi, Jeeva Ravi
description: Asthram is a gripping crime thriller that delves into a series of puzzling suicides, where victims are found stabbed under eerily similar circumstances. Determined to uncover the truth, Inspector Akilan tasked himself to investigate the case. As the investigation unfolds, Akilan gathers crucial evidence that links each case, unraveling a web of secrets.

title: Address
cast: Esakki Bharath, Atharvaa Murali, Diya Mayurikha, Thambi Ramaiah, Devadarshini
description: Address is an upcoming Indian Tamil-language action drama film written and directed by Rajamohan. The film features Esakki Barath in the lead role alongside Atharvaa in an extended cameo appearance. The film also features Pooja Jhaveri, Dhiya, Thambi Ramaiah, Devadarshini, A.

title: Good Bad Ugly
cast: Ajith Kumar, Trisha Krishnan, Arjun Das, Prasanna, Sunil Varma
description: Ajith Kumar’s 63rd film directed by Adhik Ravichandran

title: Toxic
cast: Yash, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Kiara Advani, Sudev Nair
description: Set in a bygone era, this gripping tale unfolds in the coastal paradise of Goa, where a powerful drug cartel pulls the strings behind a facade of sun-soaked beaches and vibrant culture.

title: Robinhood
cast: Nithiin, Sreeleela, Vennela Kishore, Rajendra Prasad
description: Robinhood - #VN2 Mythri Movie Makers starring Nithiin as lead actor. Directed by Venky Kudmula, Music by GV Prakash Kumar, Produced by Naveen Yerneni & Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

title: Vanangaan
cast: Arun Vijay, Roshini Prakash, Samuthirakani, Mysskin, Ridha
description: The story is about one who bows down only to love but rises against injustices inflicted on those around him.

title: Get-Set Baby
cast: Unni Mukundan, Nikhila Vimal, Meera Vasudevan, Punya Elizabeth Bose, Abhiram Radhakrishnan
description: A male gynecologist, once the sole man in his college class, works in a female-dominated field. He develops feelings for someone who initially dislikes him but slowly warms up, while facing career challenges.

title: Butterfly
cast: Jayanth, Kamalesh, Logeshwaran, Sanjay
description: In the Blur of Dreams follows a filmmaker as he directs a dream sequence, navigating the creative process while seamlessly blending the boundaries between his role behind the camera and within the story itself.
